title: Shared drive permission denied after transfer

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Access denied to Finance shared drive
servicenow_seed.description: User moved from Sales to Finance. Drive maps correctly but access is denied.

correct_steps: Confirm manager or data owner approval
Document exact share path and error
Route to IAM for group membership update if approval exists
Ask user to sign out/in after change
rationale: Permission changes for restricted shared drives should route through IAM with approval evidence.
